name: Fleming/Maclean Family Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure out all ingredients.
2. Mix butter and fruit sugar until combined.
3. Gradually add rice flour, mixing thoroughly.
4. Gradually add 1 1/2 cups of all-purpose flour, stirring continuously to form a dough that is crumbly but holds together when pressed.
5. Add the remaining 1/4 cup of flour in small amounts until the dough is just crumbly and no longer sticky.
6. Roll out on a floured surface to about 1/2 inch thick.
7. Cut into squares or circles using a small cutter or glass (approximately 3-inch diameter works best).
8. Bake at 250 degrees F on an ungreased baking sheet for 30 minutes, or until the cookies are set and do not spring back when lightly touched. Do not allow to brown.
